name: wiff
description: Deterministic, resumable multi-agent workflows for Codex — a harness-agnostic MCP server that fans work out to Codex agents from plain JavaScript scripts, with journaled resume, git worktree isolation, and personas.

scripts.check: node --check src/server.mjs && node --check src/runtime.mjs && node --check src/app-server-client.mjs && node --check src/workflow-worker.mjs && node --check src/workflow-source.mjs && node --check src/semaphore.mjs && node --check src/util.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke.mjs
